name: claude-bridge
description: Marketplace for Claude Bridge: autonomous browser handoff for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-bridge
plugins.description: When a task needs the web, Claude Code drives the browser itself: your real logged-in Chrome for account work, a headless browser for public lookups. Bundles a headless Chrome DevTools MCP engine and a routing skill; the logged-in path uses the Claude in Chrome extension via `/chrome`.
